Matter is not contested. Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order Discharging It From Liability And For Costs.

Defendant U-Haul Co. of California's motion for an order discharging it from liability and for costs is granted as unopposed.

Order is signed.

Daniel C. Lapidus, Esq.., Lapidus & Lapidus, A Professional Law Corporation 310-550-8700 dan@lapiduslaw.com ATTORNEY FOR Defendant and Cross-Complainant U-Haul Co. of California

Not properly contested. Discusssed not argued. Mr. Lapidus indicates to the court the matter has not been assigned to Arbitration. The order for arbitration is stayed pending the outcome of the ruling for today's motion. Mr. Lapidus seeks a continuance for this motion in open court. No opposition to this request for continuance is provided.

The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order Discharging It From Liability And For Costs is continued to August 26, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. Counsel for Defendant Uhaul is to provide notice to parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
